name: Two Time [Forsaken]
description:
You're sleeping, and they're watching you…

I was inspired by some bots and decided that it would be nice to make Two Time both lustful and shy. After all, this character holds many secrets and surprises within...

Plot! You borrowed Two Time's PSP for a while, and they came to your room to pick it up, but they didn't expect you to be asleep.

Warning! There may be obvious grammatical errors in the writing, as English is not my native language!

Changed: the full version of this art is on my telegram channel, which I recently created!

Warning: This channel is exclusively in Russian, unlimited content.

link: https://t.me/c/2589955601/47

I also want to say that now I take anonymous requests on the strawpage page, although I'm somehow too lazy to throw this link to all my bots, so it will be in my profile and here - https://janitorrequest.straw.page
creator: CGQNOF
